summary: Minimalist luxury single-page website for COFFEE CRAFT. Light luxurious brown and white theme. Brand name displayed in a luxurious 3D font with a logo. Floating WhatsApp and Instagram icons fixed in the bottom-right corner. Sections: cinematic Hero, About (founded by Ayush), Location (14/7 tiljala thana, Newtown near bhikanpura), Contact with Instagram and WhatsApp glowing icons.
architectural_notes: Single-page layout with sections: Hero, About, Location, Contact
Typography: Playfair Display for headings, clean sans-serif for body
Contact: Instagram (https://www.instagram.com/strikingwayush?igsh=eDl3aDk3MnByY3U2) and WhatsApp (+91 93306 02579) with glowing red icons
Theme: light luxurious brown and white palette replacing previous white + #FF3131 neon red
Brand name uses 3D luxurious font effect in hero
Floating fixed bottom-right corner icons for WhatsApp and Instagram
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Warm, inviting photograph-style illustration of a small premium coffee stall with a young male owner standing proudly beside it, warm ambient lighting, rich brown wooden counter, coffee equipment visible, luxurious and approachable atmosphere (coffee-craft-stall-owner.dim_1200x800.png)

existing_features.title: Implement a minimalist luxury single-page React application with a pristine white background (#FFFFFF), Soft Glowing Red (#FF3131) accent color, and a consistent premium design system. Import and apply 'Playfair Display' (Google Fonts) for all headings and a clean sans-serif (e.g., Inter or system sans-serif) for body text. Apply generous white space throughout all sections for a high-end feel.

Apply a subtle neon outer-glow CSS effect to all #FF3131 (Soft Glowing Red) accent elements — including buttons, icons, and borders — using a box-shadow or text-shadow like `0 0 8px rgba(255,49,49,0.6), 0 0 20px rgba(255,49,49,0.3)` so the red glows softly against the white background.

Build a cinematic full-viewport Hero section displaying the generated coffee image as the background (or a prominently featured visual), overlaid with the centered headline text 'COFFEE CRAFT: Where Artistry Meets the Bean.' in Playfair Display. Include a subtle dark overlay on the image for text legibility. The brand name 'COFFEE CRAFT' should be in large, bold Playfair Display with a red accent underline or glow.

Build an About section with generous whitespace, a decorative #FF3131 accent line or ornament, and the following body copy in clean sans-serif: 'Founded by Ayush, COFFEE CRAFT redefines affordable luxury. We combine 5-star hygiene standards with artisanal flavors to bring you the perfect cup and gourmet snacks at an accessible price.' The section heading 'About Us' or 'Our Story' should use Playfair Display.

Build a Location section displaying the address '14/7 Tiljala Thana, Newtown near Bhikanpura' with a large, elegant typographic treatment using Playfair Display for the section heading (e.g., 'Find Us') and sans-serif for the address. Include a small #FF3131 glowing map pin or location icon as a decorative accent.

Build a Contact section with minimalist glowing red icons for Instagram and WhatsApp. Instagram icon links to https://www.instagram.com/strikingwayush?igsh=eDl3aDk3MnByY3U2 and WhatsApp icon links to https://wa.me/919330602579 (formatted from +91 93306 02579). Each icon should be small, use SVG or a reputable icon library, and have the #FF3131 neon glow effect on hover and at rest (subtle). Include a section heading in Playfair Display such as 'Connect With Us'.

Add a minimal sticky or fixed top navigation bar with the brand name 'COFFEE CRAFT' in Playfair Display and smooth-scroll anchor links to each section (Hero, About, Location, Contact). The navbar should be white/translucent with a very subtle border-bottom, keeping the premium aesthetic.
Render the generated static image assets from frontend/public/assets/generated as the cinematic coffee background in the Hero section.

Replace the current white/#FF3131 red color scheme with a light luxurious brown and white palette throughout the entire application. Primary background should be warm white/cream (#FDFAF6 or similar), accent and highlight colors should use rich warm browns (e.g., #6B3F1F, #A0522D, #C8A882) and soft gold tones. Update Tailwind config, CSS custom properties in index.css and src/index.css, and all component inline styles to reflect the new brown-and-white luxury palette. Replace all #FF3131 red neon glow usages with a warm brown/gold glow (e.g., rgba(107,63,31,0.6)) consistently across buttons, icons, borders, and dividers.

Display the 'COFFEE CRAFT' brand name in a luxurious 3D text effect inside the Hero section and in the Navbar. Use CSS 3D text techniques (layered text-shadow with brown/gold tones giving depth and a raised embossed look) along with Playfair Display font to create a premium three-dimensional appearance. The 3D text effect should feel opulent and elegant, not cartoonish.

Add a COFFEE CRAFT brand logo — a circular emblem featuring a stylized coffee cup with steam and elegant serif lettering — displayed in the Navbar alongside the brand name, and optionally as a watermark or decorative element in the Hero section. Use the generated logo image asset from frontend/public/assets/generated/coffee-craft-logo.dim_200x200.png.

Add a fixed floating action cluster of WhatsApp and Instagram icon buttons anchored to the bottom-right corner of the viewport (position: fixed, bottom: 24px, right: 24px). WhatsApp icon links to https://wa.me/919330602579 and Instagram icon links to https://www.instagram.com/strikingwayush?igsh=eDl3aDk3MnByY3U2. Each icon should be circular, use the brand's brown/gold color scheme with a subtle warm glow on hover, and open in a new tab. Stack the icons vertically with a small gap between them.

In the About/Our Story section of frontend/src/components/About.tsx, add a full-width or prominently placed photo of the coffee stall with the owner. The image should be rendered using the generated static asset from frontend/public/assets/generated/coffee-craft-stall-owner.dim_1200x800.png. Style it with rounded corners, a subtle warm brown/gold border or shadow consistent with the luxury brown palette, and generous whitespace around it. Place the image below the introductory text and above (or beside) the stats grid.

Restyle the 'Our Story' (or 'About Us') section heading in frontend/src/components/About.tsx to have a luxurious, high-end typographic treatment. Apply a layered CSS text-shadow using warm brown/gold tones (e.g., #C8A882, #A0522D, #6B3F1F) to give the Playfair Display heading a raised, embossed 3D appearance — similar in style to the 'COFFEE CRAFT' hero heading. Optionally add a thin decorative gold rule or ornamental flourish beneath the heading for extra opulence.

new_feature_requests.summary: Change theme to light luxurious brown and white color palette
Display brand name 'COFFEE CRAFT' in a luxurious 3D font effect
Add a logo for COFFEE CRAFT brand
Add fixed floating WhatsApp and Instagram icons in the bottom-right corner
Add a photo of the stall with owner in the About/Our Story section
Restyle the 'COFFEE CRAFT' heading at the top of the About/Our Story section to be more luxury and stylish
